title: Total.js Flow
description: Open-source visual flow-based programming editor for building real-time data-processing and integration pipelines with drag-and-drop components.
installation: Image: totalplatform/flow (official Total.js platform image). Total.js Flow is fully file-based - it needs NO external database; all flow designs, custom components, uploaded files and config persist on the /www/flow volume, so back that up. The app listens on port 8000. The editor is unauthenticated by default: set FLOW_TOKEN to a long random value (e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`) to require a token, and place it behind the ingress TLS/auth as appropriate before exposing publicly - rotate FLOW_TOKEN from the placeholder. FLOW_NAME just labels the instance. On first run the empty flow workspace loads at the root URL; create or import flows from the designer. If you later need a message queue or datastore, deploy it separately and reference it from inside your flows (Flow has its own component nodes for Postgres, MongoDB, Redis, MQTT, etc.).
